title: FY5 4QD, Sesona Hill House Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/ZP3329SS/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Sesona Hill House Ltd   Installation name: Thornton Energy Recovery Centre   Permit number: EPR/ZP3329SS/A001   "
